mapper.sql: id, community_no, building_name, building_address, coord_lat, coord_lng, city, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM community ORDER BY id DESC
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO community ( community_no, building_name, building_address, coord_lat, coord_lng, city ) VALUES
(#{item.communityNo}, #{item.buildingName}, #{item.buildingAddress}, #{item.coordLat}, #{item.coordLng}, #{item.city})
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM community WHERE id IN
#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM community WHERE city = #{city} ORDER BY id DESC
